criteria.description: Controller method with historical implicit signature dispatches successfully (no 500, no exception).
criteria.notes: Asserts ok-foo response from fixture controller registered with implicit signature.

criteria.description: Each shim hit emits exactly one structured deprecation log entry with the four required context keys.
criteria.notes: Verifies controller_class, method_name, parameter_name, recommended_attribute keys; level=notice.

criteria.description: Method using explicit #[MapRoute] / #[MapQuery] produces zero deprecation log entries.
criteria.notes: Two tests cover the explicit-attribute path.

criteria.description: Unannotated array $headers (or any non-shimmed name) still raises InvalidAppControllerBindingException.
criteria.notes: Asserts the strict-mode exception is preserved for any name other than 'params'/'query'.

criteria.description: Shim applies per-parameter when only one of $params or $query is present.
criteria.notes: Two tests cover the per-parameter scoping.

criteria.description: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] carries a Fixed-section bullet referencing #1390 and naming the deprecated implicit-array shape, ready for release-cut.yml promotion.
criteria.notes: Bullet is the first item under [Unreleased] > ### Fixed and references #1390 explicitly.

criteria.description: Builder constructed without a logger does not crash; emission falls through silently via NullLogger.
Quality gate: composer cs-check (PHP-CS-Fixer dry-run) clean.
criteria.evidence: composer cs-check — files array empty, time 1.738s.

criteria.description: Quality gate: composer phpstan (level 5, 1143 files) clean.

criteria.evidence: bin/check-package-layers — package layer constraints (composer.json + PHP file-level) satisfied.

criteria.notes: No composer.json changes in this mission; gate is a no-op.

criteria.description: Quality gate: full packages/ssr/tests/ suite passes.
criteria.notes: Includes the 10 new tests added by this mission.

negative_invariants.description: Shim is name-keyed only — no broadening to type-keyed or other parameter names. Searching the builder for any string match other than 'params' or 'query' in the array branch must return zero hits beyond the two intended branches.
negative_invariants.evidence: Only `$name === 'params'` and `$name === 'query'` branches exist in the array-builtin block.

negative_invariants.description: No second dedup memo is introduced in the builder. The static spec cache in AppControllerMethodInvoker is the single source of dedup.
negative_invariants.evidence: Builder has no static state — only instance-level $logger property added.

negative_invariants.description: No psr/log usage; no error_log; no trigger_error in framework code.
negative_invariants.evidence: Only Waaseyaa\Foundation\Log\LoggerInterface and NullLogger are imported; no banned channels.
